mapper.insert: insert ignore into tb_notice (notice_number, notice_title, contract_method, amount, agency, region, demand_agency) values (#{noticeNumber}, #{noticeTitle}, #{contractMethod}, #{amount}, #{agency}, #{region}, #{demandAgency})
mapper.select: SELECT n.notice_id, n.notice_number, n.notice_title, n.contract_method, n.amount, n.region, n.agency, n.demand_agency, n.bid_start, n.bid_end, n.created_at, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT e.entity_value SEPARATOR ', ') AS entity_value, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT e.file_name SEPARATOR ', ') AS file_name, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT e.file_url SEPARATOR ', ') AS file_url FROM tb_notice n LEFT JOIN tb_notice_entity e ON n.notice_number = e.notice_number GROUP BY n.notice_id
